conservative.name: Improvised Improvements
conservative.requirements: Tools at hand, engaged with target. You must perform the prepare manoeuvre before performing this action

success.description: You cobble together something to improve the function of an item

chaosStar.description: Effect: The item affected by this action card is considered Superior while this card is recharging. This card recharges the next time a is rolled on any check

sigmarsComet.description: Eureka! Your improvements have a little more permanence; they won't fail until a total of 3 are rolled across any number of checks

delay.description: You can't rush these things! The improvements will not come into effect until the start of your next turn, in addition to the normal effects

reckless.name: Improvised Improvements
reckless.requirements: Tools at hand, engaged with target. You must perform the prepare manoeuvre before performing this action

success.description: You cobble together something to improve the function of an item

sigmarsComet.description: Eureka! You improvements have a little more permanence; Add 3 recharge tokens to this card

exertion.description: Ruch a miracle worker and you get a rotten miracle. Remove 1 recharge token from this card
